title: lastrea oligocarpa
intro: Lastrea oligocarpa, also known as the Chinese fern or Japanese fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lastrea oligocarpa include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Lastrea oligocarpa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
